rationale: The cited paper appears as a single, passing reference in the Data section to note that creators can grow follower bases through active promotion in a similar platform setting. It is not used to build the paper's core theory, derive hypotheses, justify the main empirical model, or structure the interpretation of results. The citing paper's main conceptual grounding comes from seeding and influencer literature (e.g., Hinz et al., Yoganarasimhan), so this citation functions as contextual background only.
